name: Fan out RS fields
func:
const entity = msg.data || {};
const attr = entity.attributes || entity.data?.attributes || {};
const state = msg.payload;

const make = (topic, payload) => ({ topic, payload });

return [
  make("entity", entity),
  make("attributes", attr),
  make("status", state),
  make("ok", attr.ok),
  make("raw_status", attr.raw_status),
  make("status_id", attr.status_id),
  make("status_color", attr.status_color),
  make("status_reason", attr.status_reason),
  make("status_note", attr.status_note),
  make("state", attr.state),
  make("state_description", attr.state_description),
  make("expected_back", attr.expected_back),
  make("rs", attr.rs),
  make("name", attr.name),
  make("mmsi", attr.mmsi),
  make("callsign", attr.callsign),
  make("class", attr.class),
  make("vessel_type", attr.vessel_type),
  make("station", attr.station),
  make("station_code", attr.station_code),
  make("station_region", attr.station_region),
  make("station_type", attr.station_type),
  make("timestamp", attr.timestamp),
  make("position_source", attr.position_source),
  make("latitude", attr.latitude),
  make("longitude", attr.longitude),
  make("decimal_latitude", attr.decimal_latitude),
  make("decimal_longitude", attr.decimal_longitude),
  make("image_url", attr.image_url),
  make("boats_source", attr.boats_source),
  make("ais_source", attr.ais_source),
  make("served_at", attr.served_at),
  make("stale", attr.stale),
  make("upstream_error", attr.upstream_error),
  make("selector", attr.selector),
  make("ais", attr.ais)
];

name: function 4
Philips hue control
info:
Hue control

Controls Hue scenes based on the current RS vessel raw status.

- Reads the vessel status from msg.payload
- Compares the status text in a switch node
- Matches known statuses like:
  - 30 min beredskap
  - 60 min beredskap
  - Ledig, på basen/patrulje
  - UAD
  - På oppdrag
- Sends the message to the matching output only
- Calls the correct Home Assistant scene.turn_on service
- Activates the Hue scene linked to that vessel status

Purpose:
- Changes Hue lighting automatically to reflect vessel status
- Makes the current rescue boat status visible in the room
- Uses Home Assistant scenes as the bridge to Hue

name: Phone notification
info:
function 5: 
different boat, same status → notify
same boat, different status → notify
same boat, same status → block

Function 4:
Formats RS vessel data from msg.payload into a mobile notification.

- Uses vessel name as the notification title
- Uses raw_status or status as the main status text
- Adds station and station region
- Adds RS number, MMSI, and callsign
- Converts timestamp to Europe/Oslo local time
- Adds a warning if data is stale
- Includes vessel image in the notification
- Adds tap action to open sensor.rs_vessel_status in Home Assistant

Output:
- msg.payload.title
- msg.payload.message
- msg.payload.data.image
- msg.payload.data.clickAction
- msg.payload.data.tag
- msg.payload.data.group

name: Poll RS vessel staus
info:
Fan out RS fields

Reads the full RS vessel object and splits it into separate messages.

- Takes the vessel data from msg.data / entity payload
- Extracts the full attributes object
- Keeps the main status/state value
- Creates one output message per field
- Sets msg.topic to the field name
- Sets msg.payload to the field value
- Sends full entity and full attributes to their own outputs
- Sends each important RS field to separate debug nodes

Purpose:
- Makes it easy to inspect all vessel fields in Node-RED
- Helps verify what Home Assistant is receiving
- Useful for testing before building automations or notifications
